first_run.rationale: The reasoning in both evaluations is nearly identical, focusing on the same key strengths (technical depth, open-source) and the same critical concerns (German language proficiency, lack of formal management experience). The minor differences in wording and the one-point score change are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
